creator: theraven@FreeBSD.org
text: We seem to have ended up in the worst of all possible worlds here.  We have files like nvpair.h and libzfs_core.h installed, but they depend on Solaris compat headers that are *not* installed.  Worse, we have a libnv.h that exposes an nvlist_t that looks like the one that libzfs_core.h uses, but is not actually compatible.
